## Risk & Rollback
**Risk checklist**
- [ ] Breaking change (compat plan described)
- [ ] Data migration/backfill (plan + window)
- [ ] Security/privacy change (perms/secrets/PII)
- [ ] Performance impact (baseline vs. new)
- [ ] Observability updated (metrics/logs/alerts)
- [ ] Feature flag (name, rollout, kill-switch tested)

**Rollback**
<!-- Exact steps to revert. Include data undo or flag disable if relevant. -->

- Unit: <!-- tests added/updated; link to run if possible -->
- Integration/E2E: <!-- scenarios and result link -->

**Manual / Evidence**
- Steps + expected signals:
- UI (if applicable): <!-- attach screenshots/short clip -->
- Performance (if applicable): <!-- numbers + acceptance threshold -->
